coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder. 70% FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% for 5:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 5:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 70%, 90-110 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 70% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 22% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:00 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 5:00 at 70%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 32% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 90-110 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 42% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 70% FTP, 90-110 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 42% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 42% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 52% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 90-110 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% done. 14 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 31 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.
